name: New Fortress Energy Inc.

profile.description: New Fortress Energy develops and operates LNG infrastructure. 699 employees. Revenue declined 50.8% YoY with massive losses. At $0.54/share, company faces severe financial distress.

innovation.label: WEAK
innovation.analysis: Track Record (1/3): LNG infrastructure development but revenue collapsed 50.8%. AI Deployment (0/2): None. Market Share (1/2): Niche LNG player in Caribbean markets. Product Pipeline (0/2): FLNG vessel pipeline uncertain given financial distress. R&D Intensity (1/1): LNG technology development.

inspiration.label: WEAK
inspiration.analysis: Mission Floor (1/4): Energy access mission. Community Impact (0/2): None. Employee Retention (1/2): 699 employees. Insider Buying (0/2): No data.

infrastructure.label: WEAK
infrastructure.analysis: Revenue declined 50.8% with -164.24% margin and -221.53% ROE [1]. At $0.54/share this is near-penny stock territory. Forward P/E of 7.68 assumes massive earnings recovery.

ai_resilience.label: LOW RISK
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (8/9): LNG infrastructure is physical. AI cannot replace gas processing plants and terminals. AI Opportunity (0/1): No AI revenue.

infinite_game.summary: NFE is in severe financial distress, operating in survival mode rather than playing any kind of infinite game.

investment_thesis: Forward P/E of 7.68 implies significant earnings recovery potential if LNG operations stabilize [1].
thesis_continued: Revenue declined 50.8% with -164.24% margin and -221.53% ROE [1]. At $0.54/share the company faces existential going-concern risk.
key_catalysts: LNG operations stabilization and revenue recovery
Natural gas demand growth supporting LNG infrastructure
key_risks: Going-concern risk with -164.24% margin and massive losses
Debt burden with potentially no path to refinancing
LNG market oversupply compressing margins further
sources: Yahoo Finance — NFE Key Statistics, accessed June 2026
